content: I want to make a (second) team around Casiah! Do I have anyone she plays well with? Anyone I should pull for/get with an upcoming standard guarantee?

There has been a resurgence of cassiah lately.

Doresain + Cassiah 

Or 

Kathi + Cassiah

Are the main ones recently.

Other options I've seen,

Salv or Daffodil.
Basically anybody who has one big ass fuck off card that you’d want to play every turn
At your level it wouldn’t be terrible to use her with Ramona to repeatedly play Queen’s Blade. You can use your standard guarantee on Jenkin to replay rat swarms to good effect.
What are the priorities for deepdives/dreamscapes? I am running doresain, thais, faint and ogier if it matters

According to me
It was bound to happen at some point
Character skills are "pick a card used of your choice with reduced cost", "mulligan" and exalt is "Draw 4"
The stronger other characters become, the better those tools are too

Of course.

Ultra tools of draw cards, ramp in some form (+1 arthimetica or reduce cost) and extra turn are crazy powerful mechanics when used right.

This is also like old mtg cards getting new life when a new card gets printed and has great synergy with the old one.

I did this recently with Ramona on my Doresain team. Ramona pulling doresain 3 cost and making it 0 is just really good. I benched Ramona like 4 months ago....and now she's back.

The stories?

Daffodil, Sorel, Lily and Myriam have the overall best value.
Yeah, if i am not mistaken they give posses right?
